#!/bin/bash

# Check available disk space on root partition
AVAILABLE_SPACE=21884028

# Calculate the low disk space threshold in percentage
THRESHOLD=0

# Send email alert if available disk space is below threshold
if [ "" -lt "" ]; then
    echo "Low disk space on root partition:  available out of 21884028 bytes." | sudo mail -s "Low Disk Space Alert" admin@example.com
fi
